workData.title: Poultry Watch
workData.description:
Built upon PoultryPro, a software solution supporting poultry farm businesses, this project extends its capabilities by introducing a worker management feature. This enhancement improves accessibility, allowing poultry farm owners to manage their operations more efficiently through the application. 

Conducted interviews with target users and real stakeholders to gather insights. The collected data was analyzed and categorized to identify key patterns, leading to the creation of personas and the definition of core problems. Brainstorming sessions were carried out to generate innovative ideas, followed by the development of a prototype. The prototype was tested with real users, collecting feedback on user experience and usability. The insights gained were then used to iteratively refine and improve the solution to better meet user needs.

workData.title: Happy CMU
workData.description:
Developed a mental health support program aimed at individuals seeking to improve their well-being. The Happy CMU application is designed to promote mental health and overall quality of life through a comprehensive set of features, including mental health assessments, an activity calendar, inspirational content resources, and a social feed for sharing experiences. 

The platform also includes a personalized profile system to track user progress over time. This solution empowers users to manage stress effectively and maintain a balanced lifestyle.

workData.title: iFarmTech
workData.description:
Proposed and pitched a solution for an agricultural marketplace platform by selecting the topic of a farm produce trading system. Defined target users and designed the overall platform structure, including key features essential for usability and user needs. 

Developed strategies to improve accessibility and adoption among farmers, ensuring the platform is practical and easy to use. Additionally, conducted risk analysis to identify potential challenges and points of failure, along with proposing preventive solutions to enhance the platform’s sustainability and effectiveness.

workData.title: e-commerce website
workData.client: website template to develop an e-commerce website
workData.category: website template to develop an e-commerce website
workData.description:
Developed an e-commerce website using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js (Express), and JSON, enabling users to browse products, add items to a shopping cart, and complete secure online payments. The platform supports responsive design, ensuring a seamless experience across mobile and desktop devices. 

Core features include a product catalog categorized by type, add-to-cart functionality, and a checkout system. 

Responsibilities: 
- Developed the Product Catalog by Category feature to enhance product browsing and organization 
- Implemented additional admin features to support product and system management

workData.title: Portfolio Website
workData.description:
Enhanced practical skills through hands-on projects, focusing on applying knowledge in real-world scenarios. Emphasized website design and structure development, utilizing CSS for layout design with techniques such as Flexbox and Grid. 

Styled user interfaces by applying color schemes, typography, and visual effects to improve aesthetics and user experience. Used Semantic HTML to structure content effectively, ensuring clear organization and improved accessibility.

workData.title: พร้อมช่วย
workData.client: Flood Donation and News Updates Platform
workData.category: Flood Donation and News Updates Platform
workData.description:
This website was developed to address the urgent need for providing support to flood victims across multiple affected areas in the country. Its primary objective is to serve as a centralized platform for individuals and organizations to contribute financial donations efficiently. 

Responsibilities: 
- Designed and developed the “How It Works” section, clearly explaining the service process in a structured and user-friendly manner 
- Broke down complex workflows into simple, easy-to-understand steps to enhance usability 
- Incorporated graphics and icons to support visual communication and improve user comprehension

workData.title: พร้อมช่วย
workData.description: Designed the “How It Works” webpage with a focus on delivering a clear and intuitive understanding of the service or product flow. Structured content into step-by-step sequences to enhance usability, and incorporated visuals and graphics to support user comprehension and improve overall clarity.

workData.title: NaviFlow
workData.description:
Created Personas and User Journey Maps for a navigation and travel assistance application. The goal was to understand user behaviors, needs, and pain points when planning and managing their journeys. 

Focused on scenarios such as finding the fastest and safest routes, as well as handling different travel situations. These insights were used to map user experiences, identify key touchpoints, and inform design decisions that improve usability and overall user experience.

workData.title: User Interface Design
workData.description:
This section showcases the application of UI design principles to improve usability and visual consistency. Key concepts such as hierarchy, alignment, and spacing were applied to enhance the overall user experience. 

The design process began with creating a mood board to define visual direction, including color palette, typography, and imagery. These elements were then translated into wireframes and high-fidelity prototypes using Figma. 

The final designs focus on creating a clean, modern interface with clear navigation and engaging visuals, ensuring both aesthetic appeal and usability.

workData.title: Spa Program Method Design
workData.description:
Payment System Logic Implementation 
- ManagePayment 
Handles and controls the overall workflow of the payment system. 
- inputPrices 
Collects product or service prices from users based on the specified itemCount. Validates that all inputs are numeric and positive values. 
- printReceipt 
Manages the process of generating and displaying the payment receipt. 

Programming Logic & Techniques 
- If-Else Statements 
Validate whether the quantity and price inputs are positive values 
Check user membership status (“yes” or “no”) 
Apply a 10% discount for members 
- Try-Catch 
Handle input validation to ensure values are integers or floating-point numbers 
Prevent runtime errors from invalid inputs 
- For Loop 
Iterate through each item to collect prices 
Calculate the total cost
Display individual item prices

workData.title: Secure Access Control System (Multi-Floor Building)
workData.description:
This project focuses on designing a system with security as a core priority throughout every stage of development. By addressing potential vulnerabilities from the design phase, the system ensures strong security, flexibility, and long-term maintainability. 

The system was developed to manage access control within a multi-floor building, restricting entry based on floor and room permissions. It includes features for card management, time-based encrypted access, activity logging, and user management. 

Core Features: 
- Floor & Room-Level Access Control 
- Time-Based Access with Encryption 
- Card Management (Add / Edit / Revoke) 
- Logging System (Access Attempts & Card Actions) 
- Admin & Customer Interfaces

workData.title: Project and Workshop
workData.description:
URL Shortener System Project 
Developed a system that allows users to submit long URLs and receive a unique short code. When users access the shortened URL, the system redirects them to the original (long) URL. 

Core Features: 
-POST /shorten 
Accepts a long URL and returns a generated short URL 
- GET /{shortCode} 
Redirects users to the original URL using HTTP status codes (301 or 302) 
- Business Logic 
Generates unique short codes for each URL 
Tracks the number of clicks for each shortened URL

workData.title: Smart Apartment Management System (Microservices Architecture)
workData.description:
Developed a Smart Apartment Management System using a microservices architecture to support both residents and building managers. The system includes key features such as Resident Management, Maintenance Requests, Billing & Payment, and a Notification System. 

The architecture leverages Spring Boot for service development, Maven for dependency management and build processes, Apache Kafka for asynchronous communication between services, Eureka for service discovery, and Feign Client for inter-service communication. Docker was used for containerization and deployment, enabling each service to run independently and scale efficiently. 

The core domain of the system is Resident, which is connected to related modules such as Maintenance Request, Billing, Payment, and Notification. 

Responsibilities: 
- Developed the Billing & Payment module 
- Designed the database structure (Database Design) to support system scalability and data integrity

workData.title: Car Rental Platform
workData.description:
Developed a car rental web platform that enables both car owners and renters to interact within a shared system. Users can register through a 3-step process (account creation, address setup, and role selection) and log in to access features based on their assigned roles. 

Core Features: 
- Owner Role 
Add Car, Edit Car, Delete Car, Accept Reservations, and Confirm Payments 
- Renter Role 
Rent Cars and receive a receipt after successful payment 

Responsibilities: 
- Developed user-related features, including registration, authentication, and role-based access functionality

workData.title: Good Night Hostel Management System (Case Study Assignment)
workData.description:
Conducted system analysis and design for the “Good Night Hostel” Management System, a hostel located in the Old Town area of Chiang Mai. The project focused on extracting system requirements from a given case study scenario and producing comprehensive system analysis and design documentation. 

Key deliverables included User Requirement Specification (URS), System Requirement Specification (SRS), Use Case Diagram, Activity Diagram, and Context Diagram. 

Based on the analysis, the team designed a system that enables business owners to efficiently manage room reservations, customer information, and financial operations. The system supports both online and on-site bookings, provides real-time room availability status, automatically generates receipts, and summarizes income and expenses. 

A dashboard was also designed to visualize business performance, helping owners gain clearer insights for decision-making.

workData.title: CMU-ShareCycle
workData.description:
Developed “Better CMU”, a web platform for exchanging unused items among university students, including both on-campus and off-campus residents. The platform aims to promote resource efficiency and reduce waste within Chiang Mai University. 

The system includes comprehensive features such as item posting, search and filtering, exchange requests, real-time chat, notifications, and QR code-based confirmation for item exchanges. It also supports CMU authentication to ensure user safety and trust within the platform. 

This project fosters a sharing community and encourages the circulation of reusable items within the university, contributing to a more sustainable and environmentally friendly campus (Sustainability & Green Campus initiative).

workData.title: turnPRO
workData.description:
Led the UX/UI design for a corporate website project, focusing on delivering a trustworthy and professional brand image for business clients. Developed a Design System to ensure consistency across all design elements and streamline the design process. 

Translated design concepts into interactive prototypes in Figma, reflecting real user interactions and workflows. Emphasized clear content structure and user experience, enabling users to easily access service information and contact the company efficiently.

workData.title: DitC (AI-Driven Workforce Development System)
workData.description:
Project Manager – User Flow & System Design 

Led the project by translating requirements into User Flow Diagrams to create a clear and structured system workflow. Started with analyzing both user and system requirements, then organized and connected each step into logical and easy-to-understand flows. 

Coordinated with team members and guided the overall project direction to ensure alignment across all stakeholders, reducing complexity in the development phase. Currently progressing from user flow design to wireframe development, continuing to refine the system’s structure and user experience.
